title: Web engineer at SomMobilitat
description: Scalable development and custom API integrations for SomMobilitat cooperative mobility services.
body:
**SomMobilitat** is a cooperative of sustainable mobility services. The project required building robust digital tools to manage routes, reservations and communication between users and operators.

## API integrations and mapping

A central part of the work was the integration with the **Google Maps API** to view routes, service points and geolocated information in real time. These integrations connected with **Laravel** backends that exposed data through **REST APIs**.

## Scalable architecture for cooperative services

SomMobilitat's cooperative model involved particular use cases: member management, booking systems and internal administration tools. A flexible **PHP/Laravel** architecture was built, with a frontend in **JavaScript** and **HTML5/CSS3** adapted to the specific needs of the organization.

## Version control and teamwork

All development followed a **Git**-based workflow, with branches by functionality and code reviews to ensure project quality and consistency.

## Technologies

- JavaScript
- HTML5/CSS3
- REST APIs
- Laravel
- PHP
- Git
- Google Maps API

Company: [sommobilatt.coop](https://www.sommobilatt.coop)
